name: Kobeni Yonomori
description: __Race:__ ~!Half-Human/Half-Inugami!~ The main heroine, a responsible sixteen-year-old who handles cooking and chores well. On her 16th birthday, a young man named [Hakuya](https://anilist.co/character/87583) and [Mashiro](https://anilist.co/character/87582) suddenly appear in front of her, in which it turns out that Hakuya is her fiancé and Mashiro is her future sister-in-law. ~!When she was younger, she fell down a cliff but she was saved by Hakuya Mitsumine. name: Loke
description: Loke (ロキ Roki) is a member of the Fairy Tail guild. He is very flirtatious with attractive women, being top ranked "Mage you want to have as your boyfriend". He attempts to flirt with Lucy but after finding out that she's a Stellar Spirit mage, he quickly stops his advances. Mirajane said that something must have happened to him with a similar female Stellar Spirit mage. She also mentioned that Loke once tried to flirt with Erza, but nearly got himself killed because of it. His weapon is a magic

name: Paprika
description: Paprika is a playful girl that guides others through their dreams in the experimental psychotherapy treatment. She never means any harm. She is Atsuko's alter ego.

name: Aina Yoshiwara
description: Aina is a first year at Oumi Women's University. She joins Grand Blue Diving Club after getting to know Iori and Kouhei. She is a really shy girl and hates having to expose her skin. She soon becomes good friends with Chisa. ~!She used to wear strong makeups to appear attractive not realizing her very makeup was a turn-off for men. She was part of the Tinkerbell Tennis Club but she was always looked down upon and made fun of by her seniors. Iori and Kouhei came to her rescue when she had it enou

name: Banken Man
description: Watchdog Man (番犬マン Banken-man) is a S-Class Rank 12 professional hero who is in charge of Q-City. Watchdog Man has been shown to be very blunt and nonchalant. He acts like a dog at all times, speaking sparingly, sitting on his haunches while alert or loitering, and curling up in a dog bed while asleep. He takes a stance on all fours while fighting, rather than standing upright to confront enemies.

name: Clavis
description: He is an elevator operator in the arbiter system, as well as a personal valet to Nona. His task is to transport arbiters and guests between floors. Also, he smiles a lot.

name: Shino Amakusa
description: __Height:__ 165 cm The student council president and a second-year student. She is serious, diligent, and talented in most subjects. However, she is almost always thinking of perverted things, even suggesting that one of her main reasons to be interested in Tsuda is curiosity about information not covered in health classes. She is also a very popular girl with a lot of female fans in school, and has a complex about her chest, which is exacerbated by the fact that Aria happens to be more well-end

name: Soyo Nagasaki
description: **Height:** 162 cm Soyo Nagasaki is a first-year student at Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and the bassist of **[MyGO!!!!!](https://anilist.co/staff/292754/MyGO)** Soyo is a very kind and mature girl and she is often compared to an older sister. Due to this, she is often relied on by her peers. She has a habit of fiddling with her fingertips when she's thinking or planning something. Although not outwardly hostile, Soyo can be quite cunning at times.

description: __Name meaning:__ State Branch's Sunflower __Height:__ 162 cm (5' 4'') __Occupation:__ High school student, Shrine maiden __Affiliation:__ Touhoushinki, Red Tails Aoi is a second-year student and the third leader of the "strongest ladies of Kantou", the Red Tails. She is first introduced in disguise at the park taking care of her baby brother, Kouta, who is constantly mistaken as being Aoi's own child by the mothers at the park. She is the daughter of a local temple keeper. Her nickname is Queen

name: Fischl
description: __Vision:__ Electro __Constellation:__ Corvus A mysterious girl who calls herself "Prinzessin der Verurteilung" and travels with a night raven named Oz. Currently serves as an investigator in the Adventurers' Guild. Through her unique abilities, eccentric character, and (while she would never admit it herself) hard work, Fischl has become a rising star among the Adventurers' Guild's investigators, earning the recognition of all. name: Jericho
description: Jericho is an apprentice Holy Knight who served under the Weird Fangs. She was stationed at the Baste Dungeon, where the Deadly Sin, Ban was imprisoned. She is young woman of slim build, with light hair that is swept over the left side of her face and tied into a ponytail at the back. She wears a black coat over her armor, adorned with a cross on the left side and larger cross covering the back. Underneath her armor are similarly fashioned black clothes. name: Ladd Russo
description: Ladd is a sadistic hit-man for the Russo family. His love for acts of violence truly shows in the maniacal glee he exhibits while fighting or killing. He is exceptionally skilled in hand-to-hand combat—particularly boxing—and the use of firearms. He is most happy while killing people that think they will never die and by seeing dead people or hearing gunfights. Ladd is deeply in love with his fiancée, Lua, although he expresses it through a passionate promise to kill her someday.

name: Re=L Rayford
nativeName: リィエル＝レイフォード
description: Her name, Re=L, stands for Project Revive Life. Her name was given to her by Rainer. She is a clone of her original self, Ilushia. While Ilushia has red hair, Re=L has blue hair. Her brother died when he attempted to convince Rainer to leave the organization. Unfortunately, Rainer, in return killed Shion and mortally wounded Ilushia. Glenn then saved Re=L and escaped with her, while Ilushia died.

name: Souta Munakata
description: He is a young man who travels around Japan looking for doors that appear all over the country as a "closers" to close doors that bring "disasters". He meets Suzume on his way to the ruins where the door is located. ~!He is turned into Suzume's three-legged chair by Daijin.!~

name: Ginti
description: Ginti is bartender of a bar named Viginti, which is located on the 20th floor. (Source: Death Parade Wiki)

name: Hao Asakura
description: Asakura Hao is the main antagonist in Shaman King and the most powerful shaman in the entirety of the series. ~!He was born Asaha Douji in Japan during the Heian era. During his third life he becomes the twin brother of his descendant Asakura Yoh. During his first life, he was constantly surrounded by the horrors of war and thus saw the world as a grim and dark place, until he met the small demon Ohachiyo, who taught him all the positive aspects of life. As he grew into an adult Hao became a rel

name: Julie Sigtuna
nativeName: ユリエ・シグトゥーナ
description: __Blaze:__ Twin Blades A quiet girl from a foreign country in Europe, as well as a princess. The reason she came to Japan and Kouryou Academy is because she wants to get stronger to avenge her father's death, and so she seeks out Tooru for help and to teach her his Final Move. Julie says "Yes" and "No" in Swedish: "Ja/Nej". Her Surname is also a name of a Swedish town.
searchTerms: ユリエ・シグトゥーナ

name: Miyuki Takara
description: __Height:__ 168 cm (5'6'') Miyuki is a "young lady" from a wealthy family whom is also beautiful, smart, and well-mannered. She was the president for her grade level in her first year when she became great friends with Kagami. Now Miyuki is the same class as Konata and Tsukasa. Miyuki is more relied on by her classmates in helping their studies than Nanako. Miyuki's physique is average, but she has excellent proportions; she has large breasts that Konata analogies her to a cow. Her appearance is

name: George Koizumi
description: George (real name Johji) is an eccentric, handsome, and extremely charismatic student of Yazagaku who has extraordinary talent with a gift for fashion design, haute couture in particular. Despite his cold demeanor, he has extravagant ideas on everything, most of which are not accepted by the general public. He wants Yukari to become an independent woman, as well as a girl that will take responsibility for her own mistakes. His appearance is loosely based on Brian Slade of Velvet Goldmine, and se

name: Kirby
description: Kirby is a young Star Warrior. He is spoken of in legend as Kirby of the Stars. Kirby himself is implied to be a creation of Nightmare, but he was considered a failure. Kirby is like any other child, though with a much larger appetite. He loves to play and sleep, and can be utterly fascinated by even the most mundane things. He has a strong spirit, and loves to help people—sometimes even his enemies. He even demonstrates a maternal side on occasion. Since Kirby is only a baby he does not speak m

name: Krone
description: Sister Krone runs the Grace Field House orphanage with [Madam Isabella](https://anilist.co/character/121701/Isabella). She has the desire to usurp the position of "Mama" from Isabella.

name: Reiko Kujirai
description: Reiko Kujirai is a 32-year-old, single woman working at a real estate store in Kowloon Walled City. There she lives alone in an apartment. She has a mole on the left side of her left eye and occasionally wears glasses. She loves the city of Kowloon, people, food, and likes to smoke while eating watermelon.
